summary.rationale: The revised detail page passes the explicit weed-removal review gate: redundant labels, renderer-demo prose, sample disclaimers, and heavy preview framing were removed while musical structure remains visible.

notes: Direct detail route remains valid and preserves not-found behavior from the prior implementation.
No competing primary actions were introduced.
The page now moves from song identity to chart without renderer explanatory copy.
The chart is integrated into the page instead of being presented as a separate preview card.
Representative rows fit the available pane width without page-level horizontal overflow.
Removing the shadowed paper frame improves restraint and reduces ornamental fragmentation.
The result better fits the warm restrained editorial utility profile, though the renderer itself remains utilitarian rather than fully polished music engraving.
Review explicitly checked labels, explanatory prose, sample disclaimers, and unnecessary framing/chrome.
Browser text scan confirmed renderer/sample explanatory strings are no longer visible.
Musical marks such as 2/4, D.S., and Fine were preserved.
The detail page is quieter and less demo-like after removing the framed lead-sheet preview treatment.
The remaining surface uses restrained dividers and compact metadata instead of explanatory chrome.
